rationale: Section 31.115 governs the procedural mechanism for paying ad valorem tax under protest. Changing the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) does not affect this protest-payment procedure.
quote: Payment of an ad valorem tax is involuntary if the taxpayer indicates that the tax is paid under protest:
_note: No conflict. §31.115 is a procedural provision independent of exemption amounts.
